mapper.select: SELECT order_no, user_id, product_id, order_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM seckill_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, order_no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT order_no, user_id, product_id, order_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM seckill_orders WHERE status != 'FAILED'
